title: Inspektor Blomfields Fall Nr.1 - Ich spreng euch alle in die Luft
original_title: Ich spreng euch alle in die Luft
overview: Inspector Blomfield catches a thief who has a fatal accident while trying to escape in his car. A short time later, his drug-addicted brother Johnny enters the police station while Blomfield is investigating a murder and threatens to blow himself and everyone else up with a bottle of nitroglycerine.
